concepts.name: b_kernel_7_stage_pipeline

concepts.name: retrocausal_multiverse_genesis

concepts.name: holographic_entropy_bound
concepts.description_preview: The universe as an expanding entangled field layering a massive, static probability space (white noise/fuzz). Time and information emerge from sequential correlations across this static field.
